monday.description: Pan-seared Smoked Honey-glazed Ham and Tortellini are combined with sautéed Leeks and finished with Sorrel.

tuesday.description: Fresh Black Cod is pan-seared and served with roasted Lobster Mushrooms and Gluten-free Pita Bread, finished with Pumpkin Seed Oil.

wednesday.description: Beef Tri-tip is slow-cooked and served with stir-fried Organic Leeks and Gluten-free Lo Mein Noodles, seasoned with Adobo Seasoning.

thursday.description: Grass-fed Beef Bavette is marinated and grilled, served with Organic Spring Onions and Pretzels, accompanied by a side of Oat Yogurt.

friday.description: Bratwurst is pan-seared and served in a Gluten-free Bao Bun with roasted Porcini Mushrooms and a drizzle of Sichuan Sauce.

monday.description: Sliced Stracchino is baked with Gluten-free Dumpling Wrappers and Broccoli, seasoned with Rasam Powder.

tuesday.description: Kidney Beans are slow-cooked and served with roasted Romanesco and Arepas, topped with Vegan Mayonnaise.

wednesday.description: Scamorza is filled inside Gluten-free Ravioli and served with sautéed Organic Salsify, seasoned with Ground White Pepper.

thursday.description: Canned Red Lentils are slow-cooked and served with Conchiglie and roasted Lion's Mane Mushrooms, seasoned with Shichimi Togarashi.

friday.description: Roasted Almond Butter is served with Whole Grain Cracked Wheat and roasted Organic Red Bell Peppers, finished with Ground Sichuan Peppercorns.
